summary: Provision Amazon Connect to stand up a new contact center instance. Creating an instance is an engineer-gated form — it anchors an entire contact center's telephony, queues, and agents, so nothing here is blind self-service.

operations.title: Create a new Connect instance
operations.summary: Request a new Amazon Connect contact center instance. An engineer finalizes and reviews the Terraform before it's applied.
operations.description: Specify a new aws_connect_instance: its alias, how users are managed, and whether inbound/outbound calling is enabled. Hours of operation, queues, routing profiles, phone numbers, and contact flows are always finished by the engineer afterward — this form provisions the instance shell. Submitting routes it to an engineer with a draft Terraform block to review and finish.

params.name: instance_alias
params.label: Instance alias
params.help: Becomes part of this instance's admin URL (<alias>.my.connect.aws) — must be unique across all of Amazon Connect.

params.name: identity_management_type
params.label: Identity management
params.help: CONNECT_MANAGED creates a self-contained user directory (simplest); EXISTING_DIRECTORY joins an AWS Directory Service directory already in the account; SAML federates sign-in to an external identity provider.

params.name: directory
params.label: Directory
params.help: Required only when identity management is EXISTING_DIRECTORY.

params.name: inbound_calls_enabled
params.label: Inbound calls
params.help: Allows this instance to receive inbound calls.

params.name: outbound_calls_enabled
params.label: Outbound calls
params.help: Allows agents on this instance to place outbound calls.

params.name: contact_flow_logs_enabled
params.label: Contact flow logs
params.help: Sends contact flow execution logs to CloudWatch Logs.

params.name: contact_lens_enabled
params.label: Contact Lens analytics
params.help: Turns on AI-powered call and chat analytics.

params.name: resource_name
params.label: Instance name tag
params.help: Shown as the name everywhere — consoles, tickets, this portal.

params.name: description_tag
params.label: What this instance is for
params.help: One line an operator can act on at 3 AM.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: Who to call about this instance.

decisions: Hours of operation, queues, routing profiles, phone numbers, users, and contact flows are all engineer follow-ups added after the instance exists — this form provisions the instance shell
SAML federation metadata is an engineer decision when identity management is SAML
Storage configuration for call recordings, transcripts, and chat transcripts (the companion aws_connect_instance_storage_config, pointing at S3/Kinesis) is an engineer follow-up
